projectDescription: A simple extensible settings system for Unity with automatic registration, UI binding, and metadata support.
keyFeatures: Automatic setting registration via reflection — no manual wiring required
Typed setting base classes for bool, int, float, string, enum, and command types
Range clamping for numeric settings with configurable min/max values
Metadata attribute system for display names, descriptions, categories, and UI hints
Automatic UI binding system that maps settings to appropriate UI elements
Priority-based binder registry for custom UI element overrides
Category and subcategory organization for settings panels
Zenject DI integration for dependency injection
Thread-safe value access with rollback on failed saves
UniTask-based async prefab loading for UI items
publicApiSurface: ISetting — base interface for all settings
ISetting<T> — generic typed setting interface
IRangeSetting<T> — interface for settings with min/max constraints
BaseSetting<T> — abstract base class for all settings
BaseRangeSetting<T> — abstract base class for range-constrained settings
BoolSetting — abstract boolean setting
IntSetting — abstract integer setting with range
FloatSetting — abstract float setting with range
StringSetting — abstract string setting
EnumSetting<TEnum> — abstract enum setting
CommandSetting — abstract command/action setting
VoidSetting — abstract void (no-value) setting
SettingsService.Get<T>() — retrieve setting by type
SettingsService.Get(string key) — retrieve setting by key
SettingsService.GetAll() — retrieve all registered settings
SettingsService.GetByCategory(SettingCategory) — filter by category
SettingsService.ResetAll() — reset all settings to defaults
SettingMeta.GetMetadata(ISetting) — retrieve metadata for a setting
MetadataAttribute — attribute to declare setting display/category/UI metadata
BinderRegistry.Register(ISettingBinder) — register a UI binder
BinderRegistry.FindBinder(ISetting, ISettingUIElement) — resolve a binder
ISettingBinder — interface for UI binding implementations
BaseSettingBinder<TUIElement, TValue> — base class for custom binders
ItemFactory.CreateAsync() — async creation of setting UI items
SettingCategory — enum: General, Control, Graphics, Audio, Language, Gameplay, Term
UIPreference — enum: Auto, SliderStepper, Dropdown, ToggleGroup, CheckboxGroup, InputField, Button
